name: harness-zh
description: BMad-based sprint orchestration harness for solo-dev + AI workflows (zhenhua's flavor). Provides /harness-zh:run, /harness-zh:run-test, /harness-zh:init, /harness-zh:update, /harness-zh:upgrade-deferred-work, /harness-zh:report-issue, /harness-zh:codex-catchup commands plus shared scripts, conventions, and prompt suffixes.
